from __future__ import annotations

import json


def python_perf_layer_lazy_loading_feature_flag_data_loaded_before_needed_negative(flag_name, raw_blob=None, cache=None):
    cache = {} if cache is None else cache
    if flag_name not in cache and raw_blob is not None:
        cache.update(json.loads(raw_blob))
    return bool(cache.get(flag_name, False))
